first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions praise the candidate's technical breadth and entrepreneurial spirit while consistently noting a lack of high-level AI product strategy experience and the absence of an advanced degree. The minor differences in wording and emphasis are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and are not connected to the change in location from Germany to Brazil.
